news.t: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Announces Revised Net Asset Value Information for VanEck Africa Index ETF

holdings.infoBox: AFK is an equity ETF with a total of 79 individual holdings. The top holdings are Attijariwafa Bank SA Registered Shares stock at 6.84%, Anglo American at 5.26%, Airtel Africa at 4.04%, Guaranty Trust Holding Co at 3.99%, and Endeavour Mining at 3.84%.

overview.description: The VanEck Africa Index ETF (AFK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS GDP Africa index, a GDP and market-cap-weighted index of companies generating a majority of their revenues in Africa. AFK was launched on Jul 10, 2008 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the following 2022 annual distributions per share for its VanEck® equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Announces Revised Net Asset Value Information for VanEck Africa Index ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck is announcing that the net asset value (NAV) per share of the VanEck Africa Index ETF (AFK) has been restated.

data.title: 10 Tantalizing International ETFs to Buy
data.text: China poses a risk to those broadening their portfolios beyond the U.S. These international ETFs let you play global markets without exposure to the mainland.
